description: Unique item definitions â€” base types, level requirements, and up to 12 properties per item.

name.description: Internal name identifier. Not read by 1.13c engine

completed.description: Item completion flag. Not read by 1.13c engine

beta.description: Beta content flag (unused). Not read by 1.13c engine

code.description: Base item code (references Armor/Weapons/Misc code). Not read by 1.13c engine

type.description: Primary item type code (references ItemTypes.txt). Not read by 1.13c engine

transform.description: Character model color palette transform. Not read by 1.13c engine

invtransform.description: Inventory graphic color palette transform flag. Not read by 1.13c engine

transformcolor.description: Color transform palette index. Not read by 1.13c engine

NumMods.description: Number of active modifiers. Not read by 1.13c engine

ItemMod1Code.description: Property code for unique item modifier 1 (references Properties.txt). Not read by 1.13c engine

ItemMod1Offset.description: Parameter/offset value for unique item modifier 1. Not read by 1.13c engine

ItemMod1Min.description: itemmod1 minimum value. Not read by 1.13c engine

ItemMod1Max.description: itemmod1 maximum value. Not read by 1.13c engine
